text: Some time later, Pharaoh's cupbearer and baker offended their master, the king of Egypt.
Pharaoh was angry with his chief cupbearer and chief baker.
He put them in custody in the house of the captain of the guard, the same prison where Joseph was held.
The captain assigned Joseph to attend them, and they remained in custody some time.
Both men had dreams the same night, each with its own meaning.
When Joseph came to them in the morning, he saw they were dejected.
He asked Pharaoh's officials why their faces looked so sad that day.
They said they'd had dreams with no one to interpret them; Joseph said interpretations belong to God, and asked them to tell him.
The chief cupbearer told his dream: I saw a vine in front of me.
On the vine were three branches; as soon as it budded, it blossomed and grapes ripened.
Pharaoh's cup was in my hand; I took the grapes, squeezed them into his cup, and put it in his hand.
Joseph said, this is the interpretation: the three branches are three days.
Within three days Pharaoh will restore you to your position, and you will put his cup in his hand as before.
But remember me when it goes well with you, and mention me to Pharaoh to get me out of this prison.
For I was taken from the land of the Hebrews, and even here I've done nothing to deserve prison.
Seeing the interpretation was favorable, the chief baker told his dream: I had three baskets of bread on my head.
In the top basket were all kinds of baked goods for Pharaoh, but birds were eating them out of the basket.
Joseph said, this is the interpretation: the three baskets are three days.
Within three days Pharaoh will lift off your head and hang you on a pole, and birds will eat your flesh.
Three days later, on Pharaoh's birthday, he gave a feast for his officials and lifted up the heads of both the cupbearer and the baker.
He restored the chief cupbearer to his position, and he put the cup in Pharaoh's hand.
But he hanged the chief baker, just as Joseph had said.
The chief cupbearer, however, did not remember Joseph; he forgot him.
